title: My Way
why_this_song: My Way by Frank Sinatra (1969) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I've lived a life that's full"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I traveled each and every highway"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "My friend, I'll say it clear"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "And saw it through without exemption"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Yes, there were times, I'm sure you knew"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: But then again, too few to mention
I did what I had to do
I've loved, I've laughed and cried
I've had my fill, my share of losing

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i've" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i've" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "each" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "each" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And now, the end is near
And saw it through without exemption
I've had my fill, my share of losing

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And so I face the final curtain
Yes, there were times, I'm sure you knew
I find it all so amusing

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "My Way" was released in 1969. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "My Way" foi lançada em 1969. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
